_readme: Context Guard config. Set active_plan to match your Anthropic subscription. session_output_budget = estimated output token budget per 5-hr rolling window (empirically derived). trigger_threshold = fraction of that budget at which /session-save is triggered.
_budget_note: session_output_budget values are empirically derived. Pro: calibrated from real session (102,429 output tokens = 57% → budget ~179,700). Others scaled proportionally from Anthropic's stated plan multipliers. Update if Anthropic changes limits.

free.label: Claude.ai Free
free.note: Free tier. Very limited Claude Code usage. Trigger early — recovery sessions cost too much.

pro.label: Claude.ai Pro ($20/mo)
pro.note: Pro plan. Empirically calibrated: 102,429 output tokens = 57% → ~179,700 budget. Doubled May 2026.

pro_1m.label: Claude.ai Pro — 1M context beta
pro_1m.note: Same output budget as pro, larger context window. Use if sessions aren't auto-compacting at ~168k tokens.

max_5x.label: Claude.ai Max 5x ($100/mo)
max_5x.note: Max 5x plan. 5× Pro budget = ~898,500 output tokens per 5hr. Opus access included.

max_20x.label: Claude.ai Max 20x ($200/mo)
max_20x.note: Max 20x plan. 20× Pro budget = ~3,594,000 output tokens per 5hr. No peak throttle.

team.label: Claude.ai Team ($25/seat/mo)
team.note: Team Standard. ~1.25× Pro budget per seat.

team_premium.label: Claude.ai Team Premium ($125/seat/mo)
team_premium.note: Team Premium. ~6.25× Pro budget per seat. Weekly caps apply.

api_tier1.label: Anthropic API Tier 1
api_tier1.note: API Tier 1 (requires $5 deposit, up to $100/mo). 50 RPM, 30k ITPM. Rate limits are the constraint, not session windows. Cached tokens don't count toward ITPM.

api_tier2.label: Anthropic API Tier 2
api_tier2.note: API Tier 2 ($40 cumulative spend). 1,000 RPM, 450k ITPM. More headroom.

api_tier3.label: Anthropic API Tier 3
api_tier3.note: API Tier 3 ($200 cumulative spend). 2,000 RPM, 800k ITPM. Push closer to limit safely.

api_tier4.label: Anthropic API Tier 4+
api_tier4.note: API Tier 4+ ($400+ cumulative spend). 4,000 RPM, 2M ITPM. Maximum headroom.

custom.label: Custom
custom.note: Edit context_window and trigger_threshold to any values.
